- 新增回收站功能，删除视频时可选择移入回收站而非直接删除
- 回收站中的视频可随时还原到原位置
- 在媒体库设置中可开关回收站功能
- 简化日志接口命名，提升代码可维护性

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Added recycle bin feature — deleted videos can be moved to a recycle bin instead of being permanently removed
- Videos in the recycle bin can be restored to their original location at any time
- Recycle bin can be toggled on or off in media library settings
- Simplified logging API naming for better code maintainability

</details>
